The Opportunity

The numbers don’t lie.
The revenue is already there — it just needs to be unlocked.

$300–$600
Average repair ticket in Orange County. One reactivated customer = immediate high-value revenue.
72 hrs
Time from launching your past-customer campaign to seeing booked appointments in your bay.
90 sec
Automated response time to every new inbound lead — human-sounding, 24/7.
Conservative Reactivation Estimate
If your past customer list has 500 contacts and just 3% respond to a well-crafted SMS offer — that’s 15 booked appointments. At a $400 average ticket, that’s $6,000 in revenue from a single campaign, before a single new customer walks in.
What Local Video Ads Do
Shops running localized Instagram Reels + Meta ads in OC markets report 3–8x return on ad spend. A $30–$50/day ad budget targeting Lake Forest car owners within 10 miles can generate 20–40 new inquiries per month.
Service 01 — Start Here
Customer Reactivation Engine
“Turn your dormant customer list into booked appointments — in 72 hours, with zero ad spend.”
We take your existing past-customer list, clean it, and launch a hyper-personalized SMS and email campaign. Every hot reply routes directly to your phone or gets auto-booked on your calendar. You provide the list — we handle everything else.
  • Full list cleaning, deduplication, and CRM import
  • Custom 3–5 touchpoint SMS + email sequence — written by us, approved by you
  • Offer creation & strategy (we help craft the hook with you)
  • Hot reply routing directly to your team
  • Live results within 72 hours of campaign launch
  • Full campaign monitoring and reporting
“We only collect our $500 performance bonus once we’ve booked at least 15 cars into your bays. If we fall short, you pay $1,500 and nothing more. Zero risk.”
Investment
Setup Fee$1,500
Performance Bonus+$500
Monthly RecurringNone
Performance bonus only triggers when we hit the agreed booking milestone. You pay for results.
EXAMPLE ROI
500 contacts → 15 bookings → $400 avg ticket
= $6,000 revenue from a $1,500 investment
ALL WE NEED FROM YOU
CSV from Mitchell1, Tekmetric, or your shop software — name, phone, email, last service date. ~30 minutes for onboarding. That’s the full ask.
Service 02 — Infrastructure
A Website That Matches
Your Reputation
“Your 5-star shop deserves a 5-star first impression online.”
We build a modern, mobile-first website that puts your 339 five-star reviews front and center, makes it effortless to book, and loads fast on every device. You direct the look — we handle copywriting, development, SEO, and ongoing hosting.
  • Modern design — you direct the look, we execute every detail
  • Yelp & Google reviews prominently integrated as social proof
  • Booking CTAs above the fold, mobile-first, Core Web Vitals optimized
  • Local SEO structure — schema markup, location pages, service pages
  • Domain setup, SSL certificate, and launch included
  • Ongoing hosting, uptime monitoring, and minor updates included
Who owns it? You do. The domain, code, and content are always in your name. Cancel hosting and take everything with you — no lock-in.

Service 03 — Growth Engine
Instagram Reels &
Meta Ads That Convert
“Become the most recognized auto repair brand in Lake Forest.”
People don’t trust mechanics — they trust people they recognize. We create high-impact short-form videos using Higgsfield AI, run them as hyper-targeted local ads across Instagram and Facebook, and automatically follow up with every person who engages. A steady, predictable new-customer pipeline every month.
  • 1 AI-produced video per day or 1 filmed video per week — your choice
  • Higgsfield AI production — brand-tailored, no filming required for AI option
  • Localized Meta campaigns targeting car owners within 10 miles across South OC
  • Full ad management — strategy, creative, targeting, weekly optimization
  • Automated 5-day follow-up sequence for every lead who engages
  • Monthly report: impressions, clicks, leads, and bookings attributed
Your ad spend goes directly to Meta — never through us. We recommend starting at $30–$50/day and scaling based on results you can see in your monthly report.

Your Roadmap

From where you are now
to a full growth engine — step by step.

1
Day 1 — Sign & Onboard
Export your past customer list
Pull a CSV from Mitchell1, Tekmetric, or your shop software — names, phones, emails, last service date. ~30 minutes of your time. We handle everything from there.
2
Days 2–3 — Campaign Launch
Reactivation campaign goes live
We clean your list, load it into GoHighLevel CRM, craft the offer with you, and launch. SMS and email sequences go out. Booked appointments within 72 hours.
3
Week 1–2 — Website Live
New website replaces the old one
While the reactivation campaign runs, we build and launch your new site. You review the direction, we execute. New customers now land on a page that matches your 5-star reputation.
4
Week 2–3 — Ads Go Live
First Reels and Meta ads launch
First batch of AI-produced short-form videos go live. Localized ad campaigns start running across South OC. Every engagement triggers an automated 5-day follow-up sequence.
5
Month 2 Onward — Compounding Growth
Steady pipeline, every single month
New content daily. Ads optimized weekly. New leads followed up automatically. Monthly reports delivered. Mission Auto becomes the most visible auto repair brand in South OC.

Honest Answers to Hard Questions

We expect these questions.
Here’s where we stand.

🤔“Who are you? I’ve never heard of Branch & Root.”
A local South OC team — two fathers and two sons from this area. Matthew Sr. is your primary contact. We researched your shop before this meeting. See Slide 12 for full team introductions.
📱“Won’t SMS blasts damage my reputation?”
Every message is opt-out compliant, 3–5 touchpoints max, and reads like it came from a person. You approve the full sequence before a single message sends.
💰“What if you book 14 cars instead of 15?”
You pay the $1,500 setup fee and nothing more. The $500 bonus only triggers when we hit the agreed milestone. We don’t win unless you win.
🔒“What happens to my customer data?”
Loaded into GoHighLevel (SOC 2-compliant). Never sold or shared with anyone. Clean export returned to you at campaign end. You own it at every stage.
🎬“Will AI videos look fake or cheap?”
We use Higgsfield AI — professional-grade, reviewed by our creative team before publish. We also offer filmed video (1/week) for authenticity. You choose the mix.
📉“What if Meta ads underperform?”
Monthly reports show every metric. If a campaign underperforms, we pivot strategy immediately — we don’t let it run. Starting at $30–$50/day keeps risk bounded while we find what converts.
🚪“Can I cancel? Are there contracts?”
Monthly services cancel with 30 days notice — no multi-year lock-ins. Your domain and code are always yours. Cancel hosting, take everything. No hostage-taking.
⏱️“How much of my time does this actually take?”
After 30-minute onboarding — almost none. Hot leads route to your phone. One 30-min monthly check-in. A 5-min report review. Built for shop owners already running a full operation.
Your Team

We’re not a remote agency.
We’re your South OC neighbors.
